column1: # sheet.fn.text.textjoin golden corpus (spec §7, §11 M1; Microsoft TEXTJOIN).
#   setup  ';'-separated CELL=value; value is a typed literal — bare number,
#          text:<s>, bool:TRUE|bool:FALSE, or 'empty' for a blank cell.
# TEXTJOIN(delimiter, ignore_empty, text1, ...): join with delimiter; with
# ignore_empty TRUE, blank cells AND empty strings are skipped.
